{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323183054B75D3CFD2FE46B6F8BF3"}"},"total":248},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616397494648079129","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"兄弟，信我，很好看的一本书，真的很好吃一点也不起球，也不捂脚，洗的也特别干净，泡沫很绵密买了三包了，质量非常好，与作者描述一致，孩子们都特别喜欢吃，版型很好，面料舒适，尺码标准，不沾杯持妆久，橘色系更加显白，洗完也很柔顺头发也不油了，屏幕清晰运行流畅，敏感肌用起来毫无压力，握感舒适不伤牙龈，每次炒菜都会放几本，很满意的一次购物。与卖家描述的完全一致，非常满意，完全超出期望值，发货速度非常快，包装非常仔细、严实，物流公司服务态度很好，运送速度很快，很满意的一次购物。一打开，看到包装，太可爱了，超级喜欢！价格不错，质量不错我不是托，看了三次了，质量非常好，与作者描述一致，孩子们都特别喜欢吃，版型很好，面料舒适，尺码标准，不沾杯持妆久，橘色系更加显白，洗完也很柔顺头发也不油了，屏幕清晰运行流畅，敏感肌用起来毫无压力。牙刷也不伤牙龈，刷的很干净，回弹也很快，质量很好，穿在身上二舒适，回头率百分百。每次炒菜都会放几；洗得很干净。而且这个手机壳还便宜又好看，所以每天晚上我都会吃两片。不到一周儿子就说我变好看了不少，以后买狗粮就买这家。我还跟我的朋友讨论了这本书里面的萧炎，然后发现这其实是钟离布下的一个阴谋，在他统领下，唐三与小舞与石昊展开了殊死搏斗，最后被一位名为古月方正的源神玩家截胡了[敬礼]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773334346,"group_id":"7587009104703392830","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"什么时候，才能真正获得自由呢？","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4+jMSASfv+SpR2YzSwfD8vpySDqTejZWiHHins/YPw4","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c2dbcd3647624f1688aa1f8fa6ce924d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790492&x-signature=tLrLKHhv7IkI2rmG%2B24ExBeZZ8g%3D","user_id":"2621651655335287","user_name":"天苍苍兮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2621651655335287","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7587009104703392830","book_info":{"abstract":"【锁血+爽文+全能无敌+BUG级能力】
全民觉醒职业的世界，异兽横行。
穿越三年，陈铭以破记录的潜力值却是转职出普通的C级职业。
对此他没有任何惊慌，因为他有特殊天赋：每10级自动获取一个SSS级技能！
开局更是获得唯一满级SSS技能，【绝对防御！】
从此他受到的伤害，只能是0或1！
就是神仙来了，也只能给他刮痧！
面对境外联盟危机，陈铭不语，面不改色接下毁天灭地的一击，衣角微脏。
星外文明入侵，陈铭依旧不语，淡定抬手，肉身硬抗足以歼灭星辰的一炮。
“抱歉，你们只能打掉我1滴血。”
“哦不对，现在是0了！”
星空万族:“他一个C级,一刀千万爆星是什么鬼?”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ab9ccc1e7d366cdd6299bfe8238e6568","author":"十丈秋风","author_id":"","book_id":"7587009104703392830","book_name":"转职盾卫，防御拉满，我无限锁血","book_short_name":"绝对防御，永久无限锁血！","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#184068","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"15.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7587009197544325694","read_count":"155287","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"342711"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"167","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,无敌,开局,都市异能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o835519f378ec7d457c9aba1a9dbd2f90~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445854&x-signature=F3fPMlKSSn9q6bLZbvlh8hjvOHU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3114282042001940","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"187"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323183054B75D3CFD2FE46B6F8BF3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12373,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":5281},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7617037231548629822","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"补充一下虽然作者在压等级但是在现有的给出的战力框架里主角就是无敌的存在，评论里说压等级的是没怎么仔细看，而且主角在同一辈学生中升等级永远是最快的，而且世界框架里给出的等级不是很高50级就最高战力，而且主角是能越十多级打怪的技能机制也都很无解，我不知道为什么有这么多的差评？（4000多小时老书虫）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773482848,"group_id":"7587009104703392830","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"56820277976387"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7587009104703392830","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"154"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":27314,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7617038092826755902","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看是真好看[赞]，剧情不拖泥带水，该打打绝不受着，不压战力，世界观是一点点显露出来的，没有开局就有超级boss压力你，还很搞笑[大笑]力推无脑爽文[书架加一]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773482485,"group_id":"7587009104703392830","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"咸鱼一条～～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8IX8TrK9cwwui0iX9/1RG4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/28f82d17d1fa4e32a3fe9bdaf55037ab~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787541&x-signature=PXQI0LHRtKNpe5J73uXlILtQYQs%3D","user_id":"56820277976387","user_name":"随意(^-^)"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"56820277976387"
